CONTENT.Career: Lemaître made his debut at the professional level for Reims in a 1–0 Ligue 2 loss to Sochaux on 11 February 2017. Lemaître signed his first professional contract with Reims in June 2017.Lemaître helped Reims win the 2017–18 Ligue 2, helping promote them to the Ligue 1 for the 2018–19 season.In June 2020, Lemaître joined Quevilly-Rouen on a season-long loan. On 1 July 2021, the move was made permanent, and he signed a contract until 2023.

SUMMARY: Nicolas Lemaître (born 12 January 1997) is a French professional footballer who plays as a goalkeeper for  Ligue 2 club Troyes.
